query_text: ski that handles both powder and hardpack equally well, not a specialist in either

results.explanation: Blizzard Brahma 88 strongly matches on: powder_float, versatility. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stable at speed, doesn't wander." Review: "Wide enough for off-piste" Review: "struggles only in deep powder"

Nordica Santa Ana 98 strongly matches on: versatility. Moderate match on: stiffness. Weak match on: powder_float. Review: "enough float for our wetter powder" Review: "floaty enough for powder" Review: "very versatile ski"

Fischer RC One 82 GT strongly matches on: versatility. Moderate match on: powder_float. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stiff enough for aggressive skiing" Review: "incredible stiffness for all-day piste skiing" Review: "The tip rocker helps in soft snow but it's really a piste ski."

Armada ARV 106 strongly matches on: versatility. Moderate match on: stiffness. Weak match on: powder_float. Review: "floats in powder" Review: "handles powder better than narrow park skis" Review: "encourages creativity, on hardpack groomers it's not inspiring but is tolerable"

Moderate match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "At 96mm they're right in the sweet spot" Review: "carbon Amphibio construction is unique — different flex on each edge for easier turn initiation" Review: "Wide enough for light powder"

Nordica Enforcer 100 strongly matches on: versatility. Moderate match on: powder_float. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stiff enough for experts but not punishing" Review: "impressive stiffness for all-mountain ski" Review: "100mm waist gives you enough float for powder days"

Salomon QST 106 strongly matches on: versatility. Weak match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "not as stable as heavier chargers" Review: "Floats beautifully in powder at 106mm" Review: "Good float in powder"
Dynastar M-Free 108 strongly matches on: versatility. Weak match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "incredibly stiff" Review: "well-balanced between float and grip" Review: "Floats well at 108mm"

Moderate match on: powder_float. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "incredibly stiff and powerful" Review: "Stiff and damp from the titanal construction" Review: "Float in powder is limited but acceptable for light days."
Moderate match on: stiffness. Weak match on: powder_float. Review: "floats well in powder" Review: "Good float in powder"

ground_truth.reason: Float 6, edge grip 7 — most balanced between powder and hardpack
Float 5, edge grip 7 — balanced at a lower performance level
Float 8, edge grip 6 — slightly powder-biased but still versatile
